GLOSSARY AND ABBREVIATIONS 
Analysis (Numerical) a detailed study of the state of the ocean done in Near 
real Time based on observations and numerical model. 
The operational prediction centre produces 3D time -
space analysis systems. 
A long series of analyses is of great utility for studying the 
behaviour of the ocean system.  
BAMHBI Biogeochemical Model for Hypoxic and Benthic 
Influenced areas (MAST / Université de Liège, Belgium) 
BCs Boundary Conditions 
BLK Black Sea 
BFM Biogeochemical Flux Model 
CF Climate Forecast (convention for NetCDF) 
CHL  Chlorophyll  
CMEMS Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service 
DIC Dissolved Inorganic Carbon 
FAQ Frequently Asked Question 
Forecast 
(Numerical) 
a computer forecast or predict
